codeReview.summary: This fix correctly adds the missing switch-failure accessibility announcement in `performSwitch()`, but the newly added tests do not actually verify dashboard accessibility announcement behavior for failure/success/recovery transitions as required. Most new tests only assert store state and include comments about what the view would announce, leaving the original test-coverage gap unresolved.

issues.description: The new announcement tests do not exercise `DashboardQuickSwitchView` announcement emission. `test_switchFailure_announcesError`, `test_switchSuccess_announcesSuccess`, `test_profileLoad_announcesCorrectCount`, and `test_emptyLoad_announcesNoProfiles` only call store APIs and then rely on comments (e.g., lines 738-742, 772-773, 856-858, 868-870) instead of asserting `NSAccessibility.post(...)` effects or accessibility-value transitions. This does not satisfy the feature requirement that UI tests verify announcement behavior for failure and recovery states.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `switcher-ui-worker` still records `followedProcedure: true` without required manual UI sanity checks evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requires manual checks at step 7 (`.factory/skills/switcher-ui-worker/SKILL.md`), but handoff `.../handoffs/2026-04-09T19-14-21-432Z__fast-surfaces-fix-dashboard-switch-failure-a11y-announcement__eebe3e7f-f5e1-4dd2-a2d8-7b5f767de55c.json` has `verification.interactiveChecks: []` with `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker-side procedure guidance appears insufficient for accessibility test quality: tests were added that mostly restate intended behavior in comments without asserting announcement outputs.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: In `AgentLensTests/Active/SwitcherDashboardUITests.swift`, new VAL-DASH-008 tests include explanatory comments instead of concrete assertion targets (lines 738-742, 772-773, 829-831, 856-858, 868-870), indicating a gap in skill guidance for how to verify macOS accessibility announcements.

summary: Reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, prior scrutiny context, and commit `8239349e896d27db118ed41d4f222d9f3fb7f6c6`. The code fix for switch-failure announcements is present, but the added tests do not validate announcement behavior at the UI/accessibility layer, so the feature does not fully meet its expected behavior and remains failing.
